title: What Police Stations in Kent Do We Cover? | PoliceStationRepUK

headings.text: What Police Stations in Kent Do We Cover?
Finding a Rep for a Kent Station

content:
PoliceStationRepUK lists accredited police station representatives who cover custody suites across Kent. Whether you need cover for a weekday morning attendance or an emergency call-out at three in the morning, representatives listed in our directory provide comprehensive coverage across the county.

Kent Police Custody Suites

Kent Police operates several custody suites across the county. The main facilities serve different geographical areas of Kent, handling detainees from across the region. Representatives listed in the PoliceStationRepUK directory are familiar with these locations and can attend at short notice.

The stations covered include facilities in Maidstone, Medway, Canterbury, Folkestone, Margate, Tonbridge, and other locations across the county. Kent is one of the larger territorial forces in England, and the volume of custody work means that reliable representative coverage is essential for criminal defence firms operating in the area.

Coverage and Availability

Representatives covering Kent police stations typically offer 24/7 availability. This means they can attend custody suites during office hours, evenings, nights, weekends, and bank holidays. Many operate on a rota basis with other representatives to ensure consistent coverage is maintained.

For criminal defence firms, having access to a reliable panel of Kent-based representatives means they can honour duty solicitor contracts and respond to DSCC allocations without requiring fee earners to attend every custody call-out personally. This is particularly important for firms with large duty solicitor caseloads.

How Representatives Attend

When a firm instructs a representative to attend a Kent police station, the representative travels to the relevant custody suite, identifies themselves to the custody sergeant, and begins the standard process of obtaining disclosure, conducting a private consultation with the detained person, attending the interview, and making representations on the outcome.

Representatives who regularly attend Kent stations have local knowledge that can be valuable — they know the facilities, the procedures used by local officers, and the patterns of local policing.

Finding a Rep for a Kent Station

To find a representative who covers a specific Kent police station, use the PoliceStationRepUK directory. You can search by county, by individual station, or by availability. The directory shows which stations each representative covers and their contact details for instructions.

Emergency and Out-of-Hours Cover

For urgent police station cover in Kent — such as when a client has been arrested and needs immediate representation — many representatives carry mobile phones and can respond within the hour. The directory includes representatives who specifically offer emergency and out-of-hours availability across Kent.
